excerpt: The official programme page for MSc/PgD in Intelligent Wearable Technology lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/14110-iwt-pwt-pgd Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: This programme is offered in full-time mode (stream code: 14110-IWT), part-time mode (stream code: 14110-PWT) and as a PgD (14110-PGD). Applicants are requested to specify the appropriate stream code in their online application.
